title: Slums of Berlin
writer: Luise Heilborn-Körbitz, Gerhard Lamprecht, Heinrich Zille
actors: Bernhard Goetzke, Paul Bildt, Aud Egede-Nissen
plot: A young engineer lies to protect his fiancée, and is later convicted of perjury (after which his fiancée abandons him) and sent to prison. When he gets get, he tries to return to his former life and finds out that's easier said th...
